title: lomaria ambigua
intro: Lomaria ambigua, also known as the variable fern or autumn fern, is a species of fern native to Asia and Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lomaria ambigua include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various infections. Lomaria ambigua can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses.
